title: Crescent
description: More progression and crafting, because vanilla didnt have enough.
body:
A mod that adds more progression to the game (Because lets be honest, you can get diamonds so fast like wth)
**Features:**

**New Ingots/Alloys**
>-Titanium, A new, rarer diamond that does not spawn in deepslate, and can be used to make a drill, armor, tools, and a hammer (more on that later)

>-Crescent Ore, a rare ore that spawns in the end, almost everywhere, but **__must__** be mined with an titanium drill, used to make a new armor, and can combine into...

>-Universal Alloy, and alloy made of the rarest ingots from all dimensions, Titanium, Netherite, And Crescent.
it is used to make new armor and tools, and can also be upgraded into special items.

>-Charged Alloy, and Pure Redstone, which can be used for making drills and reforge stones + more!

**New Tools!**
>-A new tool, similar to a pickaxe has been added, called drills!

>-Drills have more complicated recipes but have higher efficiently than pickaxes, letting you get more items faster.

>-Currently two drills right now, Titanium, and Universal, but I plan on making more.

>-Hammers, they are not used to break blocks, but are used to craft items made out of tougher materials.

**Reforging!**
>-Similar to Hypixel Skyblock, you can apply a reforge to an item to make it better, in one way or another.

>-There are a few reforge stones out, but more are on the way!

**New Boss**
>-Chromatic, which is spawned with an Chromatic Worm, that shoots tons of projectiles at you, and drops an hollow crescent, used for the most powerful weapon in the game.

>-More bosses are coming.

This project was coded by me in MCreator, and most of the resources were made by me, from Furfsky Reborn or from the Enigmatica Texture Pack.
This project was dedicated to Necron and The Crescent SMP.
